metadata.position_exact: Finance Accelerator Program - 24-month HQ Finance Rotations (Business Control, FP&A, Accounting, Tax, Treasury)
metadata.job_summary: 24-month rotational program through Richemont HQ finance functions including Business Control, FP&A, Accounting, Tax, and Treasury, with exposure to a Maison and Region. Requires 2-3 years post-master finance experience, strong data analysis skills, and multilingual capabilities.

research.company_mission: Richemont nurtures its Maisons and businesses through their rich diversity of arts, cultures, and human skills, with a specific ability to foster untapped potential in a responsible, sustainable manner.
research.recent_news: H1 FY26 results show 10% sales growth at constant rates to EUR 10.6B, with Q2 up 14%. Operating profit grew 24% at constant rates with 22.2% margin. Chairman Johann Rupert highlighted remarkable resilience despite macroeconomic headwinds.

resume.professional_summary: M&A Analyst with 2+ years of finance experience seeking to join Richemont's Finance Accelerator Program. Built 360-degree finance skills through financial modeling, FP&A, and cross-functional deal execution across healthcare, tech, and luxury sectors. Proven ability to drive value creation in lean teams with an agility mindset, collaborating with legal, tax, and accounting advisors on cross-border transactions.
auraia_bullets: Built detailed financial models (LBO, DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and prepared client presentations for Board meetings and investor pitches across 10+ live mandates in healthcare, tech, and luxury sectors
End-to-end execution exposure in a lean 3-person deal team covering sourcing, valuation, due diligence, negotiations, and closing for cross-border deals ranging EUR 5M-50M across Europe, US, and Asia
Coordinated with legal, tax, and accounting advisors to structure transactions and negotiate deal terms; managed data rooms, buyer universes, and client relationships throughout transaction lifecycle
resume.rc_bullet: Conducted financial and operational due diligence on 3 acquisition targets (EUR 10M-30M revenues) working directly with Healthcare and Retail divisional CEOs; prepared investment memos with market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for potential acquisitions in France and Belgium
resume.europ_bullet: Supported CFO and Head of Controlling on FP&A for CHF 50M+ Swiss subsidiary; built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI tracking KPIs, performed variance analysis on monthly P&L, and assisted in annual budget planning and quarterly rolling forecasts for 5 business units
leadership_bullets: Finalist - McKinsey Business Case: Developed data-driven model forecasting black swan events using order book data and statistical arbitrage; presented to Keyrock management (CHF 200K potential revenue)
Founder - Screeny.ai: Built full-stack AI-driven buyer identification software for M&A boutiques and PE firms; adopted by 3 advisory firms, reducing strategic buyer search time from 10h+ to 20min
Manager - Personal Investment Portfolio: Execute disciplined options strategies (Cash Secured Puts, Covered Calls) with 45-day expiries generating +8% annualized returns on 15-20 active positions
resume.courses: Corporate Finance, Valuation, Financial Accounting, Quantitative Asset and Risk Management
resume.skills: Financial Modeling (LBO, DCF) | FP&A | Data Analysis (Excel, PowerBI) | SAP | Bloomberg

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Finance Accelerator Program Position
cover_letter.intro: Richemont's remarkable H1 FY26 performance - 14% Q2 sales growth and 24% operating profit increase despite macroeconomic headwinds - demonstrates exactly the resilient, long-term value creation I seek to contribute to. Your Finance Accelerator Program's 360-degree rotational structure through Business Control, FP&A, Accounting, Tax, and Treasury aligns with my ambition to build comprehensive finance expertise within a multi-division luxury group.
cover_letter.body_1: **Transversal Finance Foundation** - My experience as sole analyst at Auraïa Capital, executing end-to-end on 10+ mandates across healthcare, tech, and luxury sectors, has built strong foundations in financial modeling, valuation, and cross-functional coordination. Working directly with legal, tax, and accounting advisors on cross-border transactions prepared me for the collaborative, multi-stakeholder environment of Richemont's HQ finance functions.
cover_letter.body_2: **FP&A and Reporting Excellence** - At Europ Assistance (Generali subsidiary), I supported the CFO on FP&A for a CHF 50M+ subsidiary, building automated dashboards in Excel and PowerBI, performing variance analysis, and assisting in annual budgeting across 5 business units. This hands-on experience in rolling forecasts and management reporting directly translates to your Business Control and Group FP&A rotations.
cover_letter.body_3: **Data Analysis and Agility** - From developing predictive models as McKinsey case finalist to building AI-driven software adopted by 3 M&A firms, I bring both analytical rigor and an entrepreneurial mindset. Managing my personal investment portfolio with disciplined options strategies reinforces my quantitative skills and risk awareness - essential for your Treasury and Tax rotations.
cover_letter.closing: Richemont's values of collegiality and nurturing untapped potential resonate with my experience thriving in lean, collaborative teams. I am eager to bring my transversal finance skills to your Accelerator Program and contribute to Richemont's continued success. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your program's objectives.

email.subject: Application - Finance Accelerator Program - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Finance Accelerator Program at Richemont.

Your remarkable Q2 performance - 14% sales growth despite macroeconomic headwinds - and the program's 360-degree rotational structure through Business Control, FP&A, Accounting, Tax, and Treasury align with my ambition to build comprehensive finance expertise within a multi-division luxury group.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
turionadrian@gmail.com
